title: system tests issues after remote rework
body:
There seem to be a few weird things I noticed in the recent logs I looked at, i.e.

```
# # podman-remote --url=unix:///tmp/CI_plDj/bats-run-6PeS5p/suite/remotesystem.podman.ow6gBp.sock
#
# artifact inspect localhost/test/replace-artifact
```

https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5770653808197632/html/sys-remote-fedora-42-aarch64-root-host-sqlite.log.html

The command we execute is now logged across two lines making it very hard to read.


Second, in the same log we see a ton of

```
         ok 304 |410| podman with nonexistent labels in 1299ms # skip Unknown runtime 'arm64
         provider: qemu
         version: 5.7.0-dev'
```

It seems like the `podman_runtime` function is now broken, I suspect that was caused by changes in https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/feb36e4fe672f899303f8aeddf7663cf70d2b17b
